subject: Araquanid, a large spider-like Pokemon with a translucent spherical water bubble encasing its head, six angular green-teal legs, depicted in a lush tropical setting near water
description: A large arachnid Pokemon stands in a vivid tropical environment. Its most distinctive feature is a large translucent water bubble that encases its upper body and head like a helmet or diving bell. The body is green and teal, with six angular, segmented legs splayed outward. The background suggests lush foliage or a shoreline, with bright greens and blues. The composition is a mid-to-wide shot showing the full creature. The overall palette is cool blue-green, giving the card a fresh, aquatic feel despite the spider anatomy.
foreground: Large spider-like creature with water bubble encasing its head, angular limbs spread wide
background: Lush tropical foliage and water-adjacent environment
emotion: poised and alert, legs spread in a defensive or ready stance
